source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/06. 제품 회로도/ROIC_1717.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: ROIC_BOARD(RIGHT) circuit diagram with 22 schematic sheets dated Friday, July 05, 2024.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Schematic reference for ROIC board right-side block diagram, power tree, input/output buffers, ROIC power, back bias, ROIC pad connections, and through-hole details.
keyPoints: Cover sheet lists 22 sheets including COVER SHEET, BLOCK DIAGRAM, POWER TREE, CLOCK_BUFFER, SIGNAL_BUFFER, ROIC_POWER, BACK_BIAS, ROIC_PAD_01 through ROIC_PAD_12, THRU HOLE, POWER_INPUT_RIGHT, and SIGNAL_INPUT_RIGHT.
Power tree lists rails including P3.0VA, AVDDI_1T4, AVDDI_5T8, AVDDI_9T12, P2.5VD, AVDD2, DVDD2, IOVDD, P5.5VA, AVDD5Q, AVDD5F, DVDD5, ADVDD5, RO_REF, N5.5VA, and NBIAS_B.
Signal input references Diff_clock 2Line(200MHz) and RF_R signal names for SPI, reset, clock, sync, data output, and ROIC pad channels.

ROIC pad sheets use 05002HR-50J05_50P connectors with pins such as AVDDI, AVDD5Q, AVDD5F, REF_TFT, REF_INT, REF_OUT, REF_ADC, AVDD2, AVDD5B, RESET, ACLK, SYNC, CS, SCK, SDO, SDI, DOUT, DCLK, IOVDD2, DVDD2, and DVDD5.

evidence.evidenceText: Title Size Document Number R e v Date: Sheet o f <Doc> A ROIC_BOARD(RIGHT) A4 1 22 Friday, July 05, 2024

evidence.claim: The sheet list includes cover sheet, block diagram, power tree, clock buffer, signal buffer, ROIC power, back bias, ROIC pad sheets, thru hole, power input right, and signal input right.
evidence.evidenceText: COVER SHEET BLOCK DIAGRAM POWER TREE CLOCK_BUFFER SIGNAL_BUFFER ROIC_POWER BACK_BIAS ROIC_PAD_11 ROIC_PAD_10 ROIC_PAD_09 ROIC_PAD_08 ROIC_PAD_07 ROIC_PAD_06 ROIC_PAD_05 ROIC_PAD_04 ROIC_PAD_03 ROIC_PAD_02 ROIC_PAD_01 THRU HOLE POWER_INPUT_RIGHT SIGNAL_INPUT_RIGHT ROIC_PAD_12

evidence.claim: The power tree includes 3 V, 2.5 V, 5.5 V, 5 V, 4.096 V, and negative 5.5 V rails.
evidence.evidenceText: P3.0VA (3V/8A) AVDDI_1T4 (2.5V/2A) AVDDI_5T8 (2.5V/2A) AVDDI_9T12 (2.5V/2A) P2.5VD (2.5V/2A) AVDD2 (2.5V/2A) DVDD2 (2.5V/2A) IOVDD (2.5V/2A) P5.5VA (5.5V/0.6A) AVDD5Q (5V/0.8A) AVDD5F (5V/0.8A) DVDD5 (5V/0.8A) ADVDD5 (5V/0.8A) RO_REF (4.096V/10mA) N5.5VA (-5.5V/0.6A) NBIAS_B (-5V/0.8A)

evidence.claim: The signal input sheet references differential clock at 200 MHz.
ROIC pad connector sheets use 05002HR-50J05_50P connectors.
ROIC pad connector pins include power, reference, reset, clock, SPI, data output, and shield pins.
